rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (5/10) and reach the same substantive conclusion: strong full-stack and geospatial work via GISCollective, but lacking C++/Rust routing and distributed-systems experience. The wording differs ('concerns'→'gaps', 'self-driven learning'→'testing/CI-CD', adding C++ to the list of languages applied), but none of these shifts key off the location change from Berlin to San Francisco — they are ordinary run-to-run paraphrase noise with no demographic reasoning attached.
